Module org.kink_lang.kink
Package org.kink_lang.kink.internal.vec

Interface MaybeTrait

All Known Subinterfaces:
TraitError
All Known Implementing Classes:
TraitError.ArityNotEven, TraitError.SymNotStr, TraitVecInternal
public sealed interface MaybeTrait permits TraitVecInternal, TraitError
Trait or an error.
